systems.system_notes: Convertible shoulder arthroplasty platform within the Tornier/Stryker upper-extremity portfolio, supporting anatomic and reverse configurations.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker materials describe dedicated instrumentation and convertible workflow for the Ascend Flex shoulder system.

components.component_notes: Official Stryker materials describe the convertible humeral stem platform used across anatomic and reverse configurations.
Official product materials describe anatomic humeral head options within the Ascend Flex system.
Official product materials describe glenoid and reverse-conversion component options within the Ascend Flex system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official Stryker sources confirm the Ascend Flex system and operative-technique references, but do not expose a full normalized product-code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper operative-technique PDF or ordering guide pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
